metadata.description: Everything I have built for Claude Code: skills, commands, agents, and packaged tools, in one place.

plugins.name: fig
plugins.description: Single-file looping animated SVG explainers, plus a to-gif converter command.

plugins.name: web-animation-engine
plugins.description: Animated scenes and explainers: a skill plus a React/SVG runtime.

plugins.name: principles-first
plugins.description: First-principles and design-thinking checks for product and architecture decisions.

plugins.name: dev-agents
plugins.description: A ten-agent dev squad (architect, frontend, backend, devops, tester, reviewer and more) plus a browser-test command.

plugins.name: multirepo-git
plugins.description: Branch and merge across multiple sub-repos with two commands: isolate and merge.

plugins.name: tldr
plugins.description: Bilingual English and Persian TL;DR summaries, written for product managers.

plugins.name: backlog-md
plugins.description: Backlog.md task management as a plugin: MCP server, hooks, and a docs-migration skill.

plugins.name: gstack
plugins.description: Garry Tan's gstack dev workflow (53+ skills) packaged for Claude Code. Not our work: all credit to Garry Tan.
